Document:
# Resomi
Resomi are a small avian raptor species that hail from an icy world. Fast, social, and fragile - they are built for speed and communication, not for combat.
## Biology
Resomi are immune to cold damage thanks to their ammonia-based blood and thick plumage. However, they find temperatures above 30°C unbearably hot, taking [color=#ff4444]30% more heat damage[/color] than other species. They also have weaker bones, resulting in [color=#ff4444]15% more brute damage[/color] taken overall.
Like most non-human species, Resomi can digest raw meat and uncooked animal proteins without issue.
Due to their small size they can fit inside duffelbags, weigh less than most species, and deal Slash damage with unarmed attacks.
## Combat Limitations
Resomi are not built for fighting. They deal [color=#ff4444]15% less melee damage[/color] than other species. Play to your strengths - escape, communicate, and let others handle direct confrontation.
## Nesting
Resomi can toggle a temporary nest using the [color=#aaddff]Nest[/color] action in their action bar.
While nesting: - The Resomi becomes [color=#ffdd88]completely immobile[/color] - Slowly [color=#00cc66]regenerates all damage types[/color] (except genetic and radiation) - Receives [color=#00cc66]reduced incoming damage[/color] - Rapidly [color=#00cc66]recharges their Restfulness bar[/color]
The action has a short wind-up before nesting begins. Press the action again to leave the nest at any time. [color=#ff4444]You cannot nest while restrained.[/color]
## Restfulness
Resomi have a unique [color=#ffdd88]Restfulness bar[/color] visible in the HUD. It drains passively over time and can [color=#ff4444]only be recharged by nesting[/color] - not by eating or resting.
[color=#88ff88]● Above 80%[/color] - Sprint speed [color=#00cc66]+15%[/color] [color=#ffdd88]● 30 - 80%[/color] - No effect [color=#ff4444]● Below 30%[/color] - Sprint speed [color=#ff4444]-20%[/color]
The bar empties in roughly [color=#ff4444]8 minutes[/color] and fully recharges in [color=#00cc66]4 minutes[/color] of uninterrupted nesting. Plan ahead - find a safe corner to nest before your restfulness runs out.
## Calling
Resomi can emit a [color=#aaddff]Call[/color] - a short chirp that acts as a directional signal for nearby Resomis.
- Only [color=#00cc66]other Resomis within range[/color] can hear it - Non-Resomi species are completely unaware of the signal - Recipients receive a [color=#ffdd88]floating notification[/color] above their character with the caller's name and compass direction (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW) - The notification does [color=#aaddff]not appear in the chat panel[/color] - Can be used [color=#00cc66]while nesting or restrained[/color]
Use it to coordinate with fellow Resomis, call for help, or arrange a meeting point - without alerting the rest of the crew.
## Summary
[color=#00cc66]✦ Immune to cold damage[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Can nest to heal and recharge Restfulness[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Sprint speed boost when well-rested[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Calling ability to signal nearby Resomis[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Can digest raw meat[/color] [color=#00cc66]✦ Fits in duffelbags[/color]
[color=#ff4444]✦ Suffers above 30°C - takes 30% more heat damage[/color] [color=#ff4444]✦ Takes 15% more brute damage[/color] [color=#ff4444]✦ 15% less melee damage[/color] [color=#ff4444]✦ Restfulness drains every 8 minutes - must nest to recharge[/color] [color=#ff4444]✦ Cannot nest while restrained[/color]
